epigraph.quote: We are camped right next to the water with only some bushes between us + the waves.

per_stop.quote: We had lunch at Bowness next to a graveyard
We walked 3 miles around Rydal Water, seeing Wordsworth's house which was closed, as it was after 5pm
Stuck in a time-warp. The railway never came.
We've camped at Pier Cottage * * * * which is so beautiful that we have decided to stay more than one night.
